name: meal-planner-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Plan meals, calculate nutrition, generate shopping lists, and suggest substitutes.

tools.name: plan_meals
tools.description: Generate a meal plan for the specified diet type and calorie target.

tools.name: calculate_macros
tools.description: Calculate macronutrient totals for a list of meal names.

tools.name: generate_shopping_list
tools.description: Generate a consolidated shopping list for a meal plan.

tools.name: suggest_substitutes
tools.description: Suggest ingredient substitutes for dietary restrictions, allergies, or preferences.
